name: Mutual Exclusion
generated_spec:
---- MODULE MutualExclusion ----
EXTENDS Naturals, Sequences, TLC

CONSTANT N

VARIABLES state, turn, flag
TypeOK == 
    /\ state ∈ [i ∈ 1..N |-> {"idle", "trying", "critical"}]
    /\ flag ∈ [i ∈ 1..N |-> BOOLEAN]
    /\ turn ∈ 1..N

(* Init defines the initial state of the system *)
Init == 
    /\ state = [i ∈ 1..N |-> "idle"]
    /\ flag = [i ∈ 1..N |-> FALSE]
    /\ turn = 1

(* Next defines the possible transitions of the system *)
Next == 
    \E i ∈ 1..N :
        /\ flag[i] = FALSE
        /\ flag' = [flag EXCEPT ![i] = TRUE]
        /\ turn' = i
        /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![i] = "critical"]
        /\ UNCHANGED << state, flag, turn >> \* For simplicity, we assume that only one process can enter critical section at a time

(* Spec defines the overall behavior of the system *)
Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<state, flag, turn>>

(* -- TLC configuration block *)
\* TLC configuration
\* SPECIFICATION Spec
\* INVARIANT TypeOK

name: Dining Philosophers
generated_spec:
---- MODULE DiningPhilosophers ----
EXTENDS Naturals, Sequences, TLC

CONSTANTS N

VARIABLES forks, state

(* fork ownership: forks[i] = j means fork i is held by philosopher j; forks[i] = -1 means fork i is free *)
(* philosopher state: state[i] ∈ {"thinking", "hungry", "eating"} *)

TypeOK == 
  /\ forks ∈ [1..N -> 1..N \/ -1]
  /\ state ∈ [1..N -> {"thinking", "hungry", "eating"}]
  /\ forks[i] = -1 \/ forks[i] ∈ 1..N
  /\ state[i] ∈ {"thinking", "hungry", "eating"}

Init == 
  /\ forks = [i \in 1..N |-> -1]
  /\ state = [i \in 1..N |-> "thinking"]

Next == 
  \E i \in 1..N :
    /\ state[i] = "thinking"
    /\ forks[i] = -1
    /\ forks[If(i = 1, N, i-1)] = -1
    /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![i] = "hungry"]
    /\ forks' = [forks EXCEPT ![i] = i, ![If(i = 1, N, i-1)] = i]
  \/ \E i \in 1..N :
    /\ state[i] = "hungry"
    /\ forks[i] = i
    /\ forks[If(i = 1, N, i-1)] = i
    /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![i] = "eating"]
    /\ forks' = forks
  \/ \E i \in 1..N :
    /\ state[i] = "eating"
    /\ forks[i] = i
    /\ forks[If(i = 1, N, i-1)] = i
    /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![i] = "thinking"]
    /\ forks' = [forks EXCEPT ![i] = -1, ![If(i = 1, N, i-1)] = -1]

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<forks, state>> /\ TypeOK

name: Producer-Consumer Queue
generated_spec:
---- MODULE BoundedFIFO ----
EXTENDS Naturals, Sequences, TLC

CONSTANT K \* Queue capacity

VARIABLES q, head, tail, size

(* q is a sequence of length K, representing the queue slots.
   head and tail are indices into q, ranging from 0 to K-1.
   size is the number of elements currently in the queue. *)

TypeOK == 
  /\ q \in Seq(0..K-1)
  /\ head \in 0..K-1
  /\ tail \in 0..K-1
  /\ size \in 0..K
  /\ size = Len(q)

Init == 
  /\ q = <<>> \* Empty sequence
  /\ head = 0
  /\ tail = 0
  /\ size = 0

Producer == 
  /\ size < K
  /\ head' = (head + 1) % K
  /\ tail' = tail
  /\ size' = size + 1
  /\ q' = Append(q, head)

Consumer == 
  /\ size > 0
  /\ head' = head
  /\ tail' = (tail + 1) % K
  /\ size' = size - 1
  /\ q' = Remove(q, tail)

Next == 
  \/ Producer
  \/ Consumer

Spec == 
  /\ Init
  /\ [][Next]_<<q, head, tail, size>>
  /\ TypeOK

name: Simple Key-Value Store
generated_spec:
---- MODULE KeyValueStore ----
EXTENDS Naturals, Sequences, TLC

CONSTANTS Keys, Values

VARIABLES store

(* Type invariant *)
TypeOK == store \in [Keys -> Values]

(* Initial state: all keys map to a default value *)
Init == store = [k \in Keys |-> defaultValue]

(* Put operation: updates the value for a key *)
Put(k, v) == store' = [store EXCEPT ![k] = v]

(* Get operation: reads the value for a key *)
Get(k) == store' = store

(* Next-state relation: either a Put or a Get *)
Next == \E k \in Keys, v \in Values: Put(k, v) \lor Get(k)

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_store

---- MODULE SingleDecreePaxos ----
EXTENDS Naturals, Sequences, TLC

CONSTANTS N, M, V

                                      acceptedValue : V \cup {None} ] ]

ProposersState == [ p \in 1..M |-> [ ballot : Nat,

                                     value : V \cup {None} ] ]

\* Initial state
Init == /\ acceptors \in AcceptorsState
      /\ proposers \in ProposersState

                                            promisedBallot |-> 0,
                                            acceptedBallot |-> 0,
                                            acceptedValue |-> None,

      /\ chosenValue = None

\* Proposer's Prepare phase
Prepare(p) == /\ proposers[p].ballot' = proposers[p].ballot + 1
            /\ proposers[p].promisedBallot' = proposers[p].ballot'
            /\ proposers[p].acceptedBallot' = proposers[p].acceptedBallot
            /\ proposers[p].acceptedValue' = proposers[p].acceptedValue
            /\ proposers[p].value' = proposers[p].value

name: Bounded Retransmission Protocol
generated_spec:
---- MODULE FileTransfer ----
EXTENDS Naturals, Sequences, TLC

CONSTANTS MAX_RETRIES, CHUNK_SIZE, FILE_SIZE

(* Type definitions *)
TypeOK == /\ fileChunks \in Seq(Seq(Nat))
        /\ sentChunks \in Seq(Seq(Nat))
        /\ retransmitCount \in Seq(Nat)
        /\ channel \in Seq(Seq(Nat))

(* Initial state *)
Init == /\ fileChunks = SubSeq(Seq(1..FILE_SIZE), 1, CHUNK_SIZE)
        /\ sentChunks = <<>>
        /\ retransmitCount = <<>>
        /\ channel = <<>>

(* Sending a chunk *)
SendChunk == /\ sentChunks' = Append(sentChunks, lastChunk)
            /\ retransmitCount' = Append(retransmitCount, 0)
            /\ channel' = Append(channel, lastChunk)
            /\ UNCHANGED <<fileChunks>>
  where lastChunk == SubSeq(fileChunks, Len(fileChunks), CHUNK_SIZE)

(* Retransmitting a chunk *)
RetransmitChunk == /\ sentChunks' = Append(sentChunks, lastChunk)
                 /\ retransmitCount' = Append(retransmitCount, lastCount + 1)
                 /\ channel' = Append(channel, lastChunk)
                 /\ UNCHANGED <<fileChunks>>
  where lastChunk == SubSeq(fileChunks, Len(fileChunks), CHUNK_SIZE)
        lastCount == RetransmitCount(lastChunk)

(* RetransmitCount: get the retransmit count for a chunk *)
RetransmitCount(chunk) == IF chunk \in sentChunks
                        THEN RetransmitCount(chunk) == RetransmitCount(chunk)


(* Next state *)
Next == \/ SendChunk
      \/ RetransmitChunk

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<fileChunks, sentChunks, retransmitCount, channel>>

EXTENDS Naturals, Sequences, TLC

Db == [k: Key |-> v: Value]

\* A transaction is a record with fields:

\*   start: the time at which it began
\*   commit: the time at which it committed (0 if not yet committed)
\*   abort: the time at which it aborted (0 if not yet aborted)
Tx == [id: Nat, start: Nat, commit: Nat, abort: Nat]

\* The set of active transactions
Txns == [t: Tx |-> t]

\* The snapshot visible to each transaction

\* The set of writes pending for each transaction

\* The set of committed transactions
Committed == [t: Tx |-> t]

\* The set of all transactions
AllTxns == Txns \cup Committed \cup Aborted

\* The set of all keys
Keys == DOMAIN db

\* The set of all values

\* The set of all transaction identifiers
TxIds == {t.id \in Tx |-> t.id}

\* The set of all transaction times
TxTimes == TxStarts \cup TxCommits \cup TxAborts

name: Clock Synchronisation
generated_spec:
---- MODULE ClockSync ----
EXTENDS Naturals, Sequences, TLC

CONSTANTS N, epsilon, maxDrift

(* Type definitions *)
TypeOK == /\ clocks \in Seq(N)
          /\ offsets \in Seq(N)
          /\ \A i \in 1..N : clocks[i] \in Nat
          /\ \A i \in 1..N : offsets[i] \in Nat
          /\ \A i \in 1..N : offsets[i] <= maxDrift

(* Initial state *)
Init == /\ clocks = [i \in 1..N |-> 0]
        /\ offsets = [i \in 1..N |-> 0]

(* Drift update *)
Drift == /\ offsets' = [i \in 1..N |-> offsets[i] + RandomDrift]
        /\ clocks' = [i \in 1..N |-> clocks[i] + offsets[i] + RandomDrift]
        /\ TypeOK

(* Random drift within bounds *)
RandomDrift == CHOOSE d \in 0..maxDrift

(* Synchronisation step *)
Sync == /\ \A i \in 1..N : clocks[i] = AvgClock
        /\ offsets' = [i \in 1..N |-> 0]
        /\ TypeOK

(* Average clock value *)
AvgClock == ROUND(AVG(clocks))

(* Next-state relation *)
Next == Drift \/ Sync

(* Specification *)
Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<clocks, offsets>> /\ TypeOK

name: Gossip Protocol
generated_spec:
---- MODULE GossipProtocol ----
EXTENDS Naturals, Sequences, TLC

CONSTANTS N, Updates

VARIABLES known, infected

(* known: a mapping from node IDs to the set of updates they know *)
(* infected: a set of node IDs that are infected (i.e., have received at least one update) *)

(* TypeOK ensures that known is a mapping from node IDs to subsets of Updates *)
TypeOK == 
  /\ known \in [1..N -> [Updates -> BOOLEAN]]
  /\ infected \subseteq 1..N

(* Init: Initially, each node knows a subset of Updates (could be empty), and infected is empty *)
Init == 
  /\ known \in [1..N -> [Updates -> BOOLEAN]]
  /\ infected = {}

(* Next: In each round, each node shares its known updates with a random subset of other nodes *)
Next == 
  /\ \E node \in 1..N:
       \E peers \subseteq 1..N \ {node}:
          \E newKnown \subseteq Updates:
             /\ newKnown \subseteq Updates
             /\ known' = [known EXCEPT ![node] = newKnown]
             /\ infected' = infected \cup {node}
  /\ \E node \in 1..N:
       \E peers \subseteq 1..N \ {node}:
          \E newKnown \subseteq Updates:
             /\ newKnown \subseteq Updates
             /\ known' = [known EXCEPT ![node] = newKnown]
             /\ infected' = infected

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<known, infected>>

name: Publish-Subscribe Broker
generated_spec:
---- MODULE Broker ----
EXTENDS Naturals, Sequences, TLC

VARIABLES subscribers, messages, nextMsgId, nextSubId
Topic == [name: STRING]
Message == [id: Nat, topic: Topic, content: STRING]
SubscriberId == Nat
PublisherId == Nat

\* Helper functions
IsTopic(t) == t \in DOMAIN messages
IsSubscriber(s) == s \in DOMAIN subscribers

\* Initialization
Init ==
  /\ subscribers = [t \in Topic : {}]
  /\ messages = [t \in Topic : <<>>]
  /\ nextMsgId = 1
  /\ nextSubId = 1

\* Actions
RegisterSubscriber(t) ==
  /\ IsTopic(t)
  /\ nextSubId \in Nat
  /\ subscribers' = [subscribers EXCEPT ![t] = subscribers[t] \cup {nextSubId}]
  /\ nextSubId' = nextSubId + 1
  /\ UNCHANGED <<messages, nextMsgId>>

PostMessage(t, c) ==
  /\ IsTopic(t)
  /\ nextMsgId \in Nat
  /\ messages' = [messages EXCEPT ![t] = Append(messages[t], [id |-> nextMsgId, topic |-> t, content |-> c])]
  /\ nextMsgId' = nextMsgId + 1
  /\ UNCHANGED <<subscribers, nextSubId>>

DeliverMessage(t, m) ==
  /\ IsTopic(t)
  /\ m \in messages[t]
  /\ subscribers[t] \in SUBSET SubscriberId
  /\ UNCHANGED <<subscribers, messages, nextMsgId, nextSubId>>

Next ==
  \/ \E t \in Topic : RegisterSubscriber(t)
  \/ \E t \in Topic, c \in STRING : PostMessage(t, c)
  \/ \E t \in Topic, m \in messages[t] : DeliverMessage(t, m)

Spec ==
  Init /\ [][Next]_<<subscribers, messages, nextMsgId, nextSubId>>

\* Type invariant
TypeOK ==
  /\ subscribers \in [Topic -> SUBSET SubscriberId]
  /\ messages \in [Topic -> Seq(Message)]
  /\ nextMsgId \in Nat
  /\ nextSubId \in Nat

name: Eventually Consistent Counter
generated_spec:
---- MODULE GCounter ----
EXTENDS Naturals, Sequences, TLC

CONSTANTS N, Node

VARIABLES counts

(* TypeOK ensures that counts is a function from Node to a function from Node to Nat *)
TypeOK == counts \in [Node -> [Node -> Nat]]

(* Initial state: all counts are zero *)
Init == counts = [n \in Node |-> [m \in Node |-> 0]]

(* Increment operation: node n increments its own slot *)
Increment(n) == counts' = [counts EXCEPT ![n][n] = @ + 1]

(* Merge operation: node n merges its counts with those of node m *)
Merge(n, m) == counts' = [counts EXCEPT ![n][k] = Max(@, counts[m][k]) : k \in Node]

(* Next-state relation: either an Increment or a Merge *)
Next == \E n \in Node : Increment(n) \lor \E m \in Node : Merge(n, m)

(* Total count is the sum over all nodes of the maximum count in each column *)
Total == \Sum n \in Node : Max([k \in Node |-> counts[k][n]])

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_counts

====
